description: Sector overlay for manufacturing, processing, assembly, quality assurance, product safety, environmental controls, and regulated-product documentation in Ghana.

metadata.scope: Ghana-only sector overlay controls for Manufacturing. Intended to be used with ghana_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Ghana legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Ghana Standards Authority mandate and functions
Public Health Act, 2012 (Act 851) / FDA Ghana mandate
primary_sources.issuer: Food and Drugs Authority / Ministry of Health

primary_sources.name: Cybersecurity Act, 2020 (Act 1038)
used_for: cybersecurity services and cyber-risk controls where applicable

rules.title: GSA standards, testing, inspection, or certification evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for Ghana Standards Authority standards, product certification, conformity assessment, testing, inspection, calibration, or quality documentation.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Ghana Standards Authority mandate and functions

rules.title: FDA regulated-product approval or registration evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for FDA Ghana registration, approval, licence, inspection, or regulated-product controls for food, drugs, medical devices, cosmetics, or household chemicals.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Quality management and batch/control records evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks whether manufacturing documentation contains quality assurance, batch records, traceability, non-conformance, corrective action, or inspection evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Ghana Standards Authority mandate and functions

rules.title: Employee, customer, or supplier data-protection controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for privacy notice, data protection, consent, purpose limitation, retention, or security controls in manufacturing documentation.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
